text.title: Meta Ads Campaign Setup Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-pixel
step.decision-gate: If pixel not firing, STOP and route to ads-conversion-tracking methodology.

step.name: pick-objective
step.action: Map funnel stage to objective; verify objective matches conversion event.

step.name: decide-budget-model
step.action: ≥50 conv/wk → CBO. <50 → ABO with explicit per-ad-set budgets.

step.name: design-ad-sets
step.action: Max 5 ad sets per campaign. Each gets a name per the convention.

step.name: schedule-launch
step.action: Lock structure for 7 days minimum; review at day 14.
step.decision-gate: If still in learning at day 14, pause + diagnose; do not stack new changes.
